news.headline: Keith Gill acquires 6.6% of Chewy; he clarifies he is not a feline. Notable for GameStop, Gill shocks with Chewy stake.
news.summary: Keith Gill, a notable figure in the GameStop controversy, has caught the market's attention by revealing a substantial investment in Chewy.

news.headline: Investor Po updates 7 months after maxing 8 credit cards for Bitcoin. 1.4488 BTC, $54,251 debt, $35,332 unrealized profit.
news.summary: Alternative wording:Sunny Po, an investor, recently provided an update on his unconventional investment strategy involving leveraging credit cards to purchase Bitcoin. Back in April, he made headlines by maxing out eight credit cards to buy Bitcoin totaling 1.4488 at an average price of $37,443. Currently, his credit card debt amounts to $54,251, requiring a monthly minimum payment of $542. Despite this, his unrealized profits have seen a significant uptick, now standing at $35,332, reflecting an 18.5% increase since the end of May. The debate surrounding Po's approach continues to spark interest among investors.

news.headline: Greaternity drops first double album 'THE SON OF MAN' in Virginia Beach with global availability on digital platforms.
news.summary: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, on July 1, 2024, Greaternity has unveiled their debut double album, 'THE SON OF MAN.' The album is now accessible on digital streaming platforms globally and through an Official YouTube Playlist. This highly anticipated release has been in the making for quite some time.

news.headline: Cybersecurity firm Cynergence launches to support senior leaders in achieving stronger cybersecurity, aiming to elevate executive capabilities.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, marked the debut of Cynergence on July 1, 2024, a distinguished company specializing in cybersecurity. With a focus on aiding senior executives, Cynergence aims to enhance their cybersecurity expertise. The firm's mission is to bolster leadership in cybersecurity and help executives navigate this critical aspect of business operations.

news.headline: Alex Carroll joins Eastern Union as broker in Bethesda, MD office. Focus on business development.
news.summary: In the bustling city of Bethesda, Maryland, Eastern Union, a prominent commercial real estate finance firm in the United States, has recently welcomed Alex Carroll as a new broker at their Mid-Atlantic Regional Office. Joining on July 1, 2024, Mr. Carroll's role will predominantly revolve around driving business growth and development in the region.

news.headline: FICO appoints Nikhil Behl as EVP of software business, expanding his role to lead technology and go-to-market, effective today.
news.summary: Today, FICO, a global leader in analytics software, appointed Nikhil Behl as the executive vice president for software. Behl, who has been with the company since 2014, will now oversee all technology and go-to-market functions for the software business. Previously holding roles as chief marketing officer and executive vice president for sales & marketing, Behl will now expand his responsibilities in this new position. The appointment is effective immediately and marks an important development in FICO's leadership team.

news.headline: Kit NA Brewing launches "Have A Kit, Share A Kit" program to promote non-alcoholic craft beer, promoting connection and joy.
news.summary: Portland, ME - Kit NA Brewing, a renowned brand of non-alcoholic beer, has recently introduced their "Have A Kit, Share A Kit" summer initiative. This program urges people to enjoy an authentic beer experience with a non-alcoholic option. The company aims to promote social drinking while maintaining a safe environment. The initiative is set to reach a wide audience during the summer months.

news.headline: Despegar.com, Corp. (NYSE: DESP) added to Russell 2000® Index and Russell 3000® Index on July 1, 2024. CEO Damian Scokin comments on achievement.
news.summary: Despegar.com, Corp. (NYSE: DESP), a prominent travel technology company in Latin America, revealed its addition to the Russell 2000® Index and the broad-market Russell 3000® Index as part of the yearly restructuring of the Russell equity indexes. This change will take effect on July 1, 2024, when the U.S. equity markets open. Damian Scokin, the CEO of Despegar, expressed satisfaction with this achievement, stating, "We are thrilled to be included in the Russell indexes."

news.headline: SPARC Research starts operations at Radford Army Ammunition Plant in Virginia under multi-year tenant agreement with BAE Systems.
news.summary: In Warrenton, Virginia, on July 1, 2024, SPARC Research has signed a multi-year tenant use deal with BAE Systems. This agreement allows SPARC Research to lease space at the Radford Army Ammunition Plant in Radford, Virginia. The leased area was previously utilized for undisclosed purposes.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile CEO, Abel Avellan, writes letter to partners, shareholders, and future users of space-based cellular broadband network.
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) revealed plans for creating the premier space-based cellular broadband network that can be used via regular smartphones. CEO Abel Avellan issued a letter addressing partners, shareholders, and prospective users of the network. This innovative project aims to serve both commercial and government purposes.atégic plan to achieve this ambitious goal.

news.headline: Kintara Therapeutics and TuHURA Biosciences announce corporate advancements in cancer therapies.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Kintara Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: KTRA) announced a collaboration with TuHURA Biosciences, Inc. The partnership aims to advance new therapies for solid tumor cancers. Kintara is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to this area while TuHURA specializes in immune-oncology at the Phase 3 registration stage. This partnership signifies a significant step in the development of cancer treatments and highlights the commitment of both companies in tackling this challenging medical issue.

news.headline: Hexcel Corp (NYSE: HXL) to release Q2 2024 results on July 18 before market opens; webcast and call at 10 am ET. CEO and CFO to talk.
news.summary: Hexcel Corporation (NYSE: HXL) from Stamford, Conn., will release its financial results for Q2 of 2024 on Thursday, July 18 before the market opens. The webcast and conference call discussing the highlights will occur at 10 a.m. ET, led by CEO Tom Gentile and CFO Patrick Winterlich. Investors can tune in through the Investor Relations webpage at www. Mark your calendars for this significant update on the company's performance.

news.headline: Cenntro joins Russell Microcap® Index, enhancing visibility to over $2 billion in assets under management.
AMETEK appoints Keith J. Kowalski as VP and GM of AMS Division. He was the Divisional VP and BU Manager at Precitech TMC.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, AMETEK, Inc. disclosed the selection of Keith J. Kowalski as the new Vice President and General Manager for the AMS Division. Kowalski, who brings experience from his prior role as Divisional Vice President and Business Unit Manager at Precitech TMC business, joins the company as part of their strategic leadership. AMETEK, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AME, and this decision marks a significant change within the company's upper management.

news.headline: Veterinary ophthalmology equipment market to reach $697M by 2029 with a 7.5% CAGR, driven by pet healthcare spending and COVID-19 impacts. North America leads with key players like Bausch + Lomb Corporation, Revenio Group Oyj, and Halma Plc. Challenges include high costs and limited awareness among pet owners. Key growth drivers include increasing pet ownership and technological advancements. Market features players such as Bausch + Lomb Corporation, Revenio Group Oyj, Halma Plc, and others.
news.summary: The veterinary ophthalmology equipment market is expected to grow from $485 million in 2024 to around $697 million by 2029, with a 7.5% compound annual growth rate. This growth is propelled by increasing pet ownership and pet healthcare spending due to demographic shifts and the COVID-19 pandemic. Challenges include high costs and limited awareness among pet owners. The market is segmented by animal type, application, product, end user, and region, with North America leading due to advanced veterinary infrastructure and high pet ownership rates. Key players driving innovation include Bausch + Lomb Corporation, Revenio Group Oyj, and Halma Plc. Factors driving market growth include rising pet ownership, increased pet healthcare awareness, more veterinary ophthalmologists, higher incidence of veterinary ocular diseases, and technological advancements. Key players also include Baxter International, AMETEK, HEINE Optotechnik GmbH & Co. KG, and others.

news.headline: Dogwifhat's value surges 16% amidst Solana ETF buzz, showing potential for further gains as it breaks out of BARR Bottom pattern.
news.summary: WIF is currently in the breakout phase of the BARR Bottom pattern, with the hype around the Solana ETF contributing to the optimistic outlook for the memecoin.

news.headline: MacKenzie-Childs' popular Barn Sale returns with 2,000+ items up to 60% off, starting July 18, 2024 in Aurora, N.Y.
news.summary: Starting on July 18, 2024, MacKenzie-Childs, an American heritage home décor brand known for its iconic and unique pieces blending tradition with innovation, will be hosting its highly anticipated annual sale event. The event is a favorite among fans of the brand, offering a chance to score distinctive items at discounted prices. MacKenzie-Childs' artisan-driven approach and commitment to quality craftsmanship make this event a must-attend for those seeking one-of-a-kind pieces for their homes.

news.headline: Discussing Biden & Trump in the workplace has become a challenging topic for millions amid rising political tensions.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, showing a significant improvement from the previous month. The number of new jobs created in the last quarter is estimated at 250,000, exceeding expectations of 200,000. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a 3% increase from the previous year. Experts believe these positive economic indicators are a result of various government policies and initiatives aimed at boosting the job market.

news.headline: BTIG expands research coverage to include aerospace and defense industries, emphasizing importance of sectors. - 114 characters
news.summary: In New York, BTIG has recently broadened its research coverage to encompass the aerospace and defense industries as part of its commitment to offering in-depth analysis across various sectors. This strategic expansion highlights the importance of these sectors in shaping technology, security, and global infrastructure. Ryan Serwin, CFA, BTIG's Director of Research, emphasized the critical role of aerospace and defense in future developments. The firm's inclusion of this subsector showcases their dedication to providing comprehensive insights.

news.headline: Costamare Inc. declares quarterly dividends ranging from $0.476563 to $0.554688 per share on its preferred stock.
news.summary: Costamare Inc. has declared cash dividends for its preferred stock series: $0.476563 per share for Series B, $0.531250 per share for Series C, $0.546875 per share for Series D, and $0.554688 per share for Series E. The dividends cover the period from April 15, 2024, to July 14, 2024, and will be paid on July 15, 2024, to shareholders of record as of July 12, 2024. Additionally, the Series E Preferred Stock will be redeemed at $25.00 per share on July 15, 2024, leading to no outstanding shares of Series E Preferred Stock post-Redemption.

news.headline: Rare Element Resources updates progress on rare earth plant in Wyoming, for recovery & separation.
news.summary: In Littleton, Colorado, Rare Element Resources has shared an update on its rare earth recovery and separation demo plant. The plant, located in Wyoming, is making significant progress in these operations. This development signifies a promising step forward for the company in its exploration and utilization of rare earth elements.

news.headline: Newegg's 10th FantasTech Sale from July 15-19 offers 0% APR financing, with thousands of tech deals in 50 categories.
news.summary: Newegg Commerce, Inc., a global e-commerce leader for technology products, has revealed plans for its tenth annual FantasTech Sales event. This event will feature thousands of deals across over 50 categories, offering significant discounts on various products such as computers, PC hardware, accessories, home appliances, outdoor gear, gaming devices, and tech products. The FantasTech Presale is scheduled to run from July 8 to July 14 and includes a Price Protection guarantee. This event is anticipated to bring substantial savings to consumers.

news.headline: Enlight Renewable Energy released its 2023 Sustainability Report, highlighting its achievements and initiatives in the renewable energy sector.
news.summary: Enlight Renewable Energy, a prominent global renewable energy platform, headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel, unveiled its 2023 Sustainability report on July 01, 2024. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ENLT and on TASE under ENLT.TA, shared detailed insights into its environmental and social initiatives in the report. This disclosure is key for stakeholders to understand Enlight's commitment to sustainability.

news.headline: NASDAQ grants Eightco's request for continued listing, conditional on meeting requirements by August 23, 2024, including a $1.00 bid price for 10 consecutive sessions.
news.summary: To remain listed, the company must meet specific requirements by August 23, 2024. These conditions include maintaining a bid price of $1.00 or higher for at least ten consecutive trading sessions.

news.headline: Foxo Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: FOXO) regains compliance with SEC by filing Form 10-Q for Q1 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, FOXO Technologies Inc. (NYSE American: FOXO) released a statement declaring the submission of its Form 10-Q for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2024. This action marks the company's achievement of compliance with the SEC reporting mandates.

news.headline: Prenetics adds Kathryn M. Henry and David Vanderveen to Board; prepares for consumer health expansion.
news.summary: Prenetics, a company poised for expansion into the consumer health and wellness sector, is bolstering its team with individuals who bring a wealth of experience in public companies and on boards. This move comes as Prenetics prepares to make strides in the consumer market by leveraging the expertise of individuals with decades of experience. This strategic decision aims to propel Prenetics towards success in its new venture, showcasing a commitment to growth and innovation in the health and wellness industry.

news.headline: Business reports $1 million in sales for the first quarter.
NANO Nuclear Energy and CURIO Solutions team up for advanced nuclear fuel recycling for portable microreactors using Curio’s NuCycle technology.
news.summary: Two companies have reached an agreement on a plan to enhance nuclear fuel recycling for NANO Nuclear’s advanced portable micro-reactors using Curio’s NuCycle technology.

news.headline: Orrstown Financial Services and Codorus Valley Bancorp merge into a premier community bank in PA and MD.
news.summary: Orrstown Financial Services, Inc. and Codorus Valley Bancorp, Inc. have completed their merger, forming a premier community bank in Pennsylvania and Maryland. The holding company for Orrstown Bank, Orrstown Financial Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: ORRF), and the holding company for PeoplesBank, A Codorus Valley Company, Codorus Valley Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: CVLY), finalized the merger on July 01, 2024. This merger of equals brings together two significant financial entities to enhance their presence in the region.

news.headline: RCP Advisors (NYSE: PX) launches new website and brand, a private equity firm offering access to small buyout fund managers.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), a prominent private markets solutions provider, revealed that its affiliated manager RCP Advisors, a private equity investment firm, has introduced a revamped brand identity and website. RCP offers access to North American small buyout fund managers through primary funds, secondary funds, and co-investment funds. This update marks a significant step in enhancing their online presence and market positioning.

news.headline: Exela Technologies plans to spinoff its BPA business to boost shareholder value, announced in Irving, Texas on July 1, 2024.

This move, authorized by the company's Board of Directors, aims to enhance shareholder value. Exela Technologies, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the tickers XELA and XELAP.

news.headline: Silicom to release Q2 2024 results on July 29, 2024. Conference call at 9:00 am ET. -Kfar Sava, Israel. (NASDAQ: SILC).

news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, in Salt Lake City, Sera Prognostics Inc., known as The Pregnancy Company® and listed on Nasdaq as SERA, is dedicated to enhancing maternal and neonatal health through advanced pregnancy biomarker data for healthcare professionals and individuals. The company recently revealed that due to the latest annual report…

news.headline: Above Food Corp. and Bite Acquisition Corp. begin trading on Nasdaq under "ABVE" and "ABVE.W" symbols on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta and New York, on July 01, 2024, Above Food Corp. declared that the common shares and warrants of Bite Acquisition Corp. (now trading as Above Food) are set to commence trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market under the unified entity, Above Food Ingredients Inc. The ticker symbols for the shares and warrants will be “ABVE” and “ABVE.W”, respectively. This move marks a significant step for the company as it capitalizes on its vertically integrated supply chain to offer distinct ingredients and consumer products to the market. The ticker change reflects the transition in ownership and the trading of shares, providing investors with updated symbols to track the company's performance.

news.headline: Rapport joins with ChatGPT, AWS, Azure, and Google Gemini for AI avatars, transforming customer engagement.
news.summary: Rapport's Self-Service Platform, in a groundbreaking move, now seamlessly integrates with ChatGPT, AWS, Azure, and Google Gemini. This collaboration has resulted in the development of the first-ever completely customizable and versatile AI solution for businesses. The development was announced on July 1, 2024, with London and Edinburgh, Scotland as the primary locations for this innovative project. This cutting-edge integration aims to revolutionize the way businesses utilize AI, offering unparalleled flexibility and open-ended possibilities.

news.headline: Notice to ERH shareholders about monthly distributions, CUSIP 94987E109, no conclusions on investment performance.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On July 1, 2024, it was announced that details regarding the origins of the Fund's monthly distributions are being disclosed. It is advised not to make assumptions about the Fund's investment results based on the distribution amount or the conditions of the Fund's Managed Portfolio.

news.headline: Allogene Therapeutics activates 3 community cancer centers for Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial on cema-cel with LBCL patients.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, Allogene Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: ALLO), based in South San Francisco, disclosed that Rocky Mountain Cancer Centers, which is affiliated with the US Oncology Network and Sarah Cannon Research Institute; Astera Cancer Care, part of the OneOncology network; and Norton Cancer Institute are actively enrolling participants for the pivotal Phase 2 ALPHA3 trial. Allogene is a leading biotech company focused on advancing allogeneic CAR T (AlloCAR T™) products to treat cancer and autoimmune conditions. This trial marks a significant development in their clinical-stage programs and highlights the collaboration with prestigious healthcare institutions to progress research.

news.headline: Roundhill Cannabis ETF (WEED) drops fees to 0.00% until July 1, 2025. Innovative move by Roundhill Investments.
news.summary: Roundhill Investments, an ETF sponsor known for its innovative financial products, has disclosed that the Roundhill Cannabis ETF (Cboe: WEED) will have an expense ratio of 0.00% from now until July 1, 2025. This move aims to attract more investors to the ETF, offering them a cost-effective option. The ETF, focused on the cannabis sector, presents an enticing opportunity for those looking to invest in this rapidly growing industry.

Anchin opens new office in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida to accommodate growing service needs.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the prominent New York accounting and advisory firm, Anchin, disclosed the inauguration of its latest office in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida. This move showcases the company's commitment to meeting increasing service demands.

news.headline: FDA approves IceCure's XSense Cryoablation System, a non-surgical tumor treatment. IceCure aims to revolutionize cancer care.
news.summary: In Caesarea, Israel, on July 1, 2024, IceCure Medical Ltd. (NASDAQ: ICCM) revealed its latest development. The company specializes in minimally-invasive cryoablation technology, providing an alternative to surgical tumor removal by freezing and destroying tumors. IceCure announced a significant advancement in their technology on this day but did not disclose specific details.

news.headline: Workhorse W750 to be showcased at Georgia Clean Energy Roadshow by Electric Commercial Vehicles, hosted at 3 locations.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) announced that its W750 medium-duty electric vehicle (EV) will be displayed by Electric Commercial Vehicles (ECV), a Workhorse Certified Dealer, at the 14th Annual Clean Energy Roadshow in Georgia. The Roadshow, hosted by Public Service Commissioner Tim Echols, is the state's primary venue for showcasing alternative fuel fleet vehicles. The W750 will be exhibited at three main locations: Riverside Epicenter in Austell on July 9, Savoy Automotive Museum in Cartersville on July 10, and Gwinnett Technical College North Fulton Campus in Alpharetta on July 11.

news.headline: Anbio Biotechnology to showcase at ADLM 2024 with evolved diagnostic solutions. Event from July 30-August 1 in Chicago.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Anbio Biotechnology revealed its involvement in the ADLM 2024 Clinical Lab Expo, formerly known as the AACC Clinical Lab Expo, set to occur from July 30 to August 1. Anbio is a prominent international provider of diagnostic solutions in the healthcare sector. news.headline: Reliance Global Group expands with new real estate division led by Abe Miller, investor & M&A exec.

With an impressive track record in the industry, Miller's expertise will be invaluable as he oversees this new venture and provides strategic advice for future deals. His appointment signifies a significant move by Reliance to enhance its real estate operations and capitalize on Miller's extensive experience. This decision is expected to bolster Reliance's position in the market and drive growth in the coming months.

(NASDAQ: PHUN), a company specializing in mobile experiences, was included in the FTSE Russell Microcap® Index during the 2024 FTSE Russell annual index reconstitution.
